docket_entries.description: NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER EDEN-VILLA-SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER EDEN-VILLA-SAN FRANCISCO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE SANCTION AWARD RUNS AGAINST THE PARTY, NOT ITS ATTORNEY. THE REQUEST FOR A COST WAIVER IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHOW COMPLIANCE WITH C.C.P SECTION 1284.3(B)(3) OR OTHER MEANS OF REQUESTING THE ARBITRATION COMPANY NOT TO ASSESS FEES OR COSTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-23-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
